% This is generated by ESQL's LengthTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

### LENGTH
Returns the character length of a string.

Note: All strings are in UTF-8, so a single character can use multiple bytes.

```esql
FROM airports
| WHERE country == "India"
| KEEP city
| EVAL fn_length = LENGTH(city)
```
